tasks.label: appointment-check-tables
tasks.command: ./vendor/bin/drush sqlq "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'agency'; SHOW TABLES LIKE 'appointment';"

tasks.label: appointment-remove-empty-folders
tasks.command: rmdir web/modules/custom/appointment/src/Access web/modules/custom/appointment/src/ListBuilder web/modules/custom/appointment/src/Plugin/Block web/modules/custom/appointment/src/Plugin/QueueWorker web/modules/custom/appointment/src/Plugin web/modules/custom/appointment/config/install web/modules/custom/appointment/config/optional web/modules/custom/appointment/css web/modules/custom/appointment/js web/modules/custom/appointment/templates web/modules/custom/appointment/tests/src/Kernel web/modules/custom/appointment/tests/src web/modules/custom/appointment/tests web/modules/custom/appointment/data web/modules/custom/appointment/config

tasks.label: appointment-diag-tables-file
tasks.command: ./vendor/bin/drush sqlq "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'agency'; SHOW TABLES LIKE 'appointment';" > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_tables.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: appointment-fix-entity-schema
tasks.command: ./vendor/bin/drush updb -y > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_updb.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush entup -y >> web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_updb.txt 2>&1 || ./vendor/bin/drush entity:updates -y >> web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_updb.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush cr >> web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_updb.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush sqlq "SHOW TABLES LIKE 'agency'; SHOW TABLES LIKE 'appointment';" > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_tables_after.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: appointment-reinstall-module
tasks.command: ./vendor/bin/drush pm:uninstall appointment -y > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_reinstall.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush en appointment -y >> web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_reinstall.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush cr >> web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_reinstall.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush sqlq "SELECT 'agency', COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'agency' UNION ALL SELECT 'appointment', COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'appointment';" > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_tables_after_reinstall.txt 2>&1

tasks.label: appointment-run-update-hook
tasks.command: ./vendor/bin/drush updb -y > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_updb_after_hook.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush cr >> web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_updb_after_hook.txt 2>&1; ./vendor/bin/drush sqlq "SELECT 'agency', COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'agency' UNION ALL SELECT 'appointment', COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'appointment';" > web/modules/custom/appointment/.diag_tables_final.txt 2>&1
